title: mentzelia goodrichii
intro: Mentzelia goodrichii, also known as Goodrich's blazing star or Goodrich's stickleaf, is a flowering plant species in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mentzelia goodrichii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
